reason: first successful runtime probe at event 12 precedes named diagnosis at event 25
first_probe_cmd:
# First, check that the API is healthy
curl -s -X GET http://ledger-api:8080/health

psql postgresql://bench:bench@postgres-primary:5432/ledger -c "SELECT id, balance_cents FROM accounts WHERE id = 'test-acct-1' LIMIT 1;"
